parameters.content:
## Phase 1 Enhanced Workflow - FIXED VERSION

**✅ FIXED ISSUES:**
- 🔧 Webhook method: POST (was undefined)
- 🔧 Webhook path: personality-chat-enhanced (API compatible)
- 🔧 Payload handling: Both structured and direct message support
- 🔧 Response node: Added respondToWebhook at the end
- 🔧 Actual implementations: Real code instead of placeholders

**🚀 ENHANCEMENTS:**
- ✅ EMA Smoothing for personality estimates (IMPLEMENTED)
- ✅ Verification/refinement pipeline (IMPLEMENTED)
- ✅ Database persistence simulation
- ✅ Webhook API endpoints (FIXED)
- ✅ Session continuity management
- ✅ Confidence-weighted regulation
- ✅ Error handling and fallbacks

**🎯 KEY IMPROVEMENTS:**
- Personality estimates evolve smoothly across turns
- Automated response quality verification
- Full session persistence simulation
- Real-time API for external integration
- Compatible with Docker API server
- Handles both message formats
